name: HMS Darthema (FY 676)
events: 19 Feb 1944 HMS Trenchant (Lt.Cdr. A.R. Hezlet, DSC, RN) departed from Yarmouth for Plymouth. She made the passage together with the French submarine FFS Rubis (Lt.Cdr. H.L.G. Rousselot). They were escorted by HMS Darthema (T/Lt. C. Brunning, RNVR). (1)
20 Nov 1944 Around 0800 A/20, HMS Ultimatum (Lt. W.H. Kett, DSC, RNR) departed Gosport (Portsmouth) for Fishguard. She was escorted by HMS Darthema (T/Lt. C. Brunning, RNVR). (2)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
